title: HTML Pretty Print
shortDescription: Pretty print HTML, format messy markup and use it as a lightweight HTML beautifier online.
metaTitle: HTML Pretty Print | HTML Beautifier Online
metaDescription: Pretty print HTML and beautify messy markup online. Useful for html pretty, html beautifier and format HTML online searches.
intro: This page is tuned for people searching for html pretty, html beautifier and format HTML online. Paste compact or messy markup, turn it into readable code in seconds and keep the full workflow inside your browser.
overview: HTML Pretty Print is useful for debugging nested markup, reviewing generated templates and cleaning copied HTML before QA or documentation. It focuses on readable indentation and predictable structure so you can inspect code faster without sending source to a server.
howItWorks: Paste the HTML you want to clean up.
The formatter applies readable indentation and stable spacing.
Copy the formatted output for debugging, review or handoff.
useCases: Use it as a quick HTML beautifier for messy source.
Format HTML online before code review or QA.
Make copied markup readable in tickets and documentation.
Inspect nested tags without opening a full IDE.
Clean minified HTML before sharing or debugging.

faq.question: Is this tool the same as an HTML beautifier?
faq.answer: Yes. It pretty prints and formats HTML online so messy markup becomes easier to read.

faq.question: Can I use it on minified HTML?
faq.answer: Yes. It works well on compact or minified markup that needs readable spacing for review.

faq.question: Does it change the meaning of my HTML?
faq.answer: No. It is designed to improve formatting and readability without changing the underlying markup intent.
